title: rubus menkei subsp. pannosus
intro: Rubus menkei subsp. pannosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a plant species within the Rubus genus. It is a type of bramble that is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate health issues such as arthritis and oxidative stress. Rubus menkei subsp. pannosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
